title: Abridon Government Council
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Govt_Mound.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The [[Abridon Government Center|Government Center]], home of the Government Council]]
The '''Government Council''' of [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]] was a governing body of that planet. The Council was not the only authority on the planet, however, as Abridon also had a [[Governor/Legends|governor]] and [[Lieutenant governor/Legends|lieutenant governor]]. It was most likely housed in the [[Abridon Government Center|Government Center]].

==History==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] it opened negotiations with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] after the [[Abridon Nationalists]] [[Uprising on Abridon|took control]] of the [[Abridon capital city|capital]] and much of the planet. The Alliance sent five diplomats, among them [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to negotiate Abridon's joining. However, the negotiations were cut short when [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces arrived and [[Massacre on Abridon|retook]] the planet.

Several months later, Rebel forces [[Liberation of Abridon|drove the Empire off the planet]]. At that time, Lieutenant Governor [[Hamman Flatt]] was able to guarantee the planet's loyalty to the Rebellion, suggesting that the Government Council's authority was limited or that the Council was no longer in existence at that point.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{Mo}}
